events.title: Microsoft 365 Copilot readiness and resiliency with SharePoint and M365 Backup/Archive
events.titleJa: SharePoint および M365 バックアップ/アーカイブによる Microsoft 365 Copilot の準備と復元力
events.titleEn: Microsoft 365 Copilot readiness and resiliency with SharePoint and M365 Backup/Archive
events.summary: As AI becomes embedded in everyday work, governance shifts from being a back‑office function to a strategic enabler. Organizations that succeed with Copilot and agents aren’t just moving fast (70% of early Copilot users said they were more productive) – they are prepared, resili...
events.summaryJa: AI が日常業務に組み込まれるにつれて、ガバナンスはバックオフィス機能から戦略的実現要因へと移行しています。 Copilot とエージェントで成功している組織は、単に迅速に動いているだけではなく (初期の Copilot ユーザーの 70% は、生産性が向上したと回答しています)、準備ができており、回復力があり...
events.summaryEn: As AI becomes embedded in everyday work, governance shifts from being a back‑office function to a strategic enabler. Organizations that succeed with Copilot and agents aren’t just moving fast (70% of early Copilot users said they were more productive) – they are prepared, resili...
events.importanceReason: GA になり実運用へ直結するため / 管理やガバナンスへの影響が大きいため
